id.description: Optional panel id. Defaults to a generated `cinder-popover-*` id.

offset.description: Distance in px between trigger and panel. Default `8`.

showArrow.description: Render a directional arrow on the panel. Default `false`.

label.description: Accessible name. Sets `aria-label` when `ariaLabelledby` is not supplied.

ariaLabelledby.description: Id of an element labelling the panel. Wins over `label`.

role.description: ARIA role for the panel. Default `'dialog'`.

focusManagement.description: Focus behavior for each open session. Default `'panel'`.

wireTriggerAria.description: Whether Popover owns trigger ARIA wiring. Default `true`.
